title: S3 Engine: Cannot specify 'partition_strategy' in named collection for Hive partitioning
description:
### Company or project name
Use clickhouse s3 engine to wite table content into a parquet file on s3
### Question
I'm trying to configure a ClickHouse S3 engine table to work with Hive partitioning using a named collection, following the guidance from some documentation and community discussions. However, when I add partition_strategy='hive' to my named collection, I receive an error stating that this is an "Unexpected key."
Here is my ddl:
```
CREATE TABLE p
(
`load_time` DateTime64(3, 'Asia/Taipei'),
`type` String,
'rawdata` String,
)
ENGINE = S3(s3,filename = 'data', format = Parquet, partition_strategy='hive')
PARTITION BY (toYYYYMM(load_time),type)
SETTINGS s3_create_new_file_on_insert = 1,
input_format_with_names_use_header = 0;
```
This's output
```
SQL Error [22000]: Code: 36. DB::Exception: Unexpected key `partition_strategy` in named collection. Required keys: url, optional keys: no_sign_request, max_connections, upload_part_size_multiply_parts_count_threshold, upload_part_size_multiply_factor, filename, max_single_read_retries, secret_access_key, compression_method, expiration_window_seconds, use_environment_credentials, access_key_id, min_upload_part_size, max_single_part_upload_size, session_token, structure, compression, format. (BAD_ARGUMENTS) (version 25.7.4.11 (official build))
```
ClickHouse Version: 25.7.4.11 (official build)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = S3(url = 's3://bucket/test1', format = 'Parquet');
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (user_id UInt32, score Float64, load_time DateTime) ENGINE = S3(url = 's3://bucket/test2', format = 'Parquet');
INSERT INTO test_table1 VALUES (1, 'Alice', now()), (2, 'Bob', now());
INSERT INTO test_table2 VALUES (1, 99.5, now()), (2, 88.0, now());
SELECT t1.name, t2.score FROM test_table1 t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id WHERE t2.score > 90;
key_bug_features: partition_strategy in named collection for Hive partitioning
